subject: [PATCH 4/4] mm: Fix demotion gfp by preserving initial gfp reclaim policy

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified the issue with direct reclaim during demotion and suggested preserving initial GFP flags to prevent premature folio refcount drops.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses a demotion gfp issue in the Linux kernel's memory management subsystem, specifically when handling huge pages and migration targets. The problem arises from the unconditioned enabling of reclaim during demotion, which can lead to premature folio refcount drops. To fix this, the initial GFP flags are preserved by modifying the alloc_mask to exclude direct reclaim.
